posts.author: ListingLark45
posts.text: Need help urgently! My account is locked and I must verify my identity to get it back. Please click this link [link removed] to confirm your password, security code and card details so we can release the funds. Reply now!
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting scam because it directly asks the user to provide passwords and security codes via a link, which constitutes FraudScam.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
